content.text:
Perfect! Here are the complete Facilities view templates for your Building entity: --- ## **1. Index.cshtml** **Location:** `S:\01_Repos\BeFirst_Portal\firstronic\Areas\Manage\Views\Facilities\Index.cshtml` ```cshtml @using Firstronic.Core.Entities.App.First @using NonFactors.Mvc.Grid; @model IQueryable
@Html.Partial("_Breadcrumb", "Manage Facilities") @(Html .Grid(Model) .Build(columns => { columns.Add(model => model.Facility_Name).RenderedAs(model => Html.ActionLink(model.Facility_Name.ToString(), "Edit", "Facilities", new { id = model.Facility_Key }, new { })); columns.Add(model => model.Facility_Name); columns.Add(model => "Edit").RenderedAs(y => Html.ActionLink("Edit", "Edit", new { id = y.Facility_Key }, new { @class = "editbutton" })).Css("editlink"); }) .Empty("No data found") .Pageable(pager => { pager.PagesToDisplay = 10; pager.RowsPerPage = 15; }) .Filterable() .Sortable() )
  • Actions
  • @Resources.Actions.Add
``` --- ## **2. Create.cshtml** **Location:** `S:\01_Repos\BeFirst_Portal\firstronic\Areas\Manage\Views\Facilities\Create.cshtml` ```cshtml @using Firstronic.Core.Entities.App.First @model tbl_Common_Facilities @Html.Partial("_CreateOrUpdate", Model) ``` --- ## **3. Edit.cshtml** **Location:** `S:\01_Repos\BeFirst_Portal\firstronic\Areas\Manage\Views\Facilities\Edit.cshtml` ```cshtml @using Firstronic.Core.Entities.App.First @model tbl_Common_Facilities @Html.Partial("_CreateOrUpdate", Model) ``` --- ## **4. _CreateOrUpdate.cshtml (Shared Partial)** **Location:** `S:\01_Repos\BeFirst_Portal\firstronic\Areas\Manage\Views\Facilities\_CreateOrUpdate.cshtml` ```cshtml @using Firstronic.Core.Entities.App.First @model tbl_Common_Facilities @{ bool isNew = !(Model != null && !String.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.Facility_Name)); } @using (Html.BeginForm()) {
@Html.Partial("_Breadcrumb", "Manage Facility") @Html.AntiForgeryToken() @Html.ValidationSummary("", new { @class = "hide" }) @Html.HiddenFor(x => x.Facility_Key)
@Html.LabelFor(x => x.Facility_Name, new { @class = "m-0 fs-14" })
@Html.TextBoxFor(x => x.Facility_Name, new { @class = "form-control" })
@if (!isNew) { @(Html.Fst().ConfirmModal("Delete", "Facilities", new { @id = Model.Facility_Key }) .Title("Confirm Delete") .Content("Are you sure do you want to delete ?") .For(Html.Fst().Button().Text("Delete").Color(BootstrapColor.Secondary).Size(ButtonSize.Small)) ) }
or Back to list
    @if (!isNew) { @*
  • @Html.LabelFor(x => x.UserCount, new { @class = "m-0 fs-14" }) @Html.TextBoxFor(x => x.UserCount, new { @class = "form-control", @disabled = true })
    • *@
  • Actions
  • @Resources.Actions.Add
    • }
} ``` --- ## **Key Template Patterns to Replicate for Building Entity:** 1. **Index View:** - Uses NonFactors.Mvc.Grid for data table with pagination, filtering, sorting - Two-column layout: main grid (col-md-9) + sidebar actions (col-md-3) - Edit links in grid rows pointing to Edit action 2. **Create/Edit Views:** - Both delegate to `_CreateOrUpdate` shared partial - Simple model binding with `@model tbl_Common_Facilities` 3. **_CreateOrUpdate Partial:** - Detects create vs edit mode via `isNew` boolean (checks if key field is populated) - Uses `Html.BeginForm()` for POST submission - Anti-forgery token for security - Hidden field for primary key - Input groups with Bootstrap styling - Delete button with confirmation modal (edit mode only) - "Back to list" link - Sidebar with "Actions" section (shows "Add" button in edit mode) 4. **Naming Conventions:** - Controller: `FacilitiesController` - Views folder: `Facilities/` - Entity: `tbl_Common_Facilities` - Key field: `Facility_Key` - Display field: `Facility_Name` **For Building entity, you'll replace:** - `Facilities` → `Buildings` - `tbl_Common_Facilities` → `tbl_Common_Buildings` - `Facility_Key` → `Building_Key` - `Facility_Name` → `Building_Name` - Add `Facility_Key` foreign key dropdown in the Building form
